name: deskguard-full-site
description: DeskGuard — Library Seat Booking & Anti-Hoarding App

scripts.start: npm run db:up && cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && node src/index.js
scripts.install:all: npm run server:install && npm run client:install
scripts.dev: npm run db:up && npx concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,cyan "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.dev:fast: npm run db:up && npm run server:dev
